title: Add GNSS stub for simulation and native_sim testing
description:
Add GNSS stub for native_sim (Renode already done).

Renode: GPS.cs already exists - emits NMEA GGA/RMC at 1Hz over UART. Done.

native_sim remaining work:
1. PTY or pipe as UART endpoint
2. Script or helper to feed NMEA sentences
3. Or: use Zephyr UART_PIPE with stdin/stdout for test injection

Test scenarios:
- Fixed position: feed same NMEA repeatedly
- No fix: feed sentences with fix quality 0

Acceptance: native_sim GNSS works with NMEA injection; position appears in /status.
